title: Start reading
subtitle: Pick how you want to read, then just toss me the story.
step.0.title: Style
step.1.title: Story
step.2.title: Options
mode.dehydrate.label: Rewrite & polish
mode.dehydrate.description: Rewrites it to read noticeably better — strips the filler, fixes the grammar, and polishes the prose.
mode.interactive.label: Interactive reading
mode.interactive.description: You steer the story — pick the branches and pivotal moments yourself. Just watch your step: the plot doesn't pull its punches.
novel.file.label: Upload a text file
novel.internet.label: Find it online
novel.internet.title.label: Story title
novel.internet.title.placeholder: No title? Make one up — just make sure the source has a working link.
novel.internet.author.label: Author (optional)
novel.internet.source.label: Source
novel.internet.source.placeholder: Paste a link, or drop a hint on where to find it.
novel.internet.source.tooltip: Tell me where to read it — a link, a search hint, anything that points the way. It has to be live text on a web page I can open and read, not text baked into an image or a PDF/TXT I'd have to download.
novel.internet.source.hint: Live web text only — no image-locked text, no PDFs or TXT downloads.
options.dehydrate.basic.grammarFix.label: Typos, grammar & punctuation neat-freak
options.dehydrate.basic.grammarFix.toolt: Zero tolerance for typos, mangled grammar, or rogue punctuation — half-matched quotes, orphaned brackets, the works. Reads like it never met a copyeditor? Not anymore.
options.dehydrate.basic.webSlangFilter.l: Filter cringe clichés & undo the censoring
options.dehydrate.basic.webSlangFilter.t: Burned out on 'let out a breath they didn't know they were holding', 'a shiver ran down their spine', and 'could cut the tension with a knife'? Plus all that asterisk-mangled censoring? We're cleaning house — fresh prose in, tired tropes and broken words out.
options.dehydrate.basic.preachRemoval.to: You're here for the story, not the sermon or the lore bible — even when it's disguised as inner monologue. Skip the power-level analysis; let's get to the action.
options.dehydrate.depth.dehydrate.label: Dehydrate & accelerate
options.interactive.frequency.label: Interaction frequency
options.customInstruction.label: Anything else to tweak?
options.customInstruction.placeholder: Change it however you like — just tell me.
options.customInstruction.tooltip: Make sure this doesn't conflict with the options above, or the result will be even more unpredictable than Schrödinger's cat.
